paper.title_en: A new non-commutative correction to the thermodynamics and evaporation of the Schwarzschild black hole in non-commutative gauge theory
paper.abstract_en: We investigate the modified thermodynamic properties of a deformed Schwarzschild black hole arising from new noncommutative corrections to the tetrad fields obtained through the Seiberg-Witten map. By deriving the corrected event horizon radius, we evaluate the corresponding thermodynamic quantities, including the Hawking temperature, entropy, heat capacity, Helmholtz free energy, and pressure. We also examine the evaporation process of the black hole within this noncommutative framework. The behavior of the heat capacity reveals a rich thermodynamic structure consisting of three distinct phases: two unstable phases with negative heat capacity, corresponding to a large black hole and a small black hole, separated by an intermediate stable phase with positive heat capacity. Our analysis also shows that the Schwarzschild black hole in noncommutative geometry possesses a finite lifetime that exceeds that of its classical counterpart, owing to the effective contribution of noncommutativity to the black hole mass. The noncommutative correction naturally introduces a fundamental length scale, Θ=1,6.10^-35 m, which is of the order of the Planck length.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文提出了Schwarzschild黑洞在非对易规范理论中的新非对易修正，研究了修正后的热力学性质和蒸发过程，包含丰富相结构，属于黑洞热力学领域，理论深度和创新性较高。
decision.title_zh: 非对易规范理论中Schwarzschild黑洞热力学和蒸发的新非对易修正
decision.abstract_zh: 我们研究了由通过Seiberg-Witten映射得到的tetrad场的新非对易修正产生的变形Schwarzschild黑洞的修正热力学性质。通过推导修正的事件视界半径，我们评估了相应的热力学量，包括霍金温度、熵、热容、亥姆霍兹自由能和压强。我们还在这个非对易框架内检验了黑洞的蒸发过程。热容的行为揭示了一个丰富的热力学结构，由三个不同的相组成：两个具有负热容的不稳定相，分别对应一个大黑洞和一个小黑洞，它们被一个具有正热容的中间稳定相隔开。我们的分析还表明，非对易几何中的Schwarzschild黑洞具有有限的寿命，且由于其经典对应物，这归因于非对易性对黑洞质量的有效贡献。非对易修正自然地引入了一个基本长度尺度Θ=1.6×10^-35 m，与普朗克长度同量级。
